summary: Full testing of Chantier 8 (Decisions CRUD) and Dashboard Heatmap. All 15 backend tests pass (100%). All UI flows verified: heatmap visible on dashboard, decisions CRUD in ProjectDetail and Governance, viewer read-only, filters working.
seed_data_creation: TEST_UI_Decision created and deleted during testing. 32 seeded decisions verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chantier 8 fully validated. Decisions API: GET returns 32 seeded decisions, POST/PUT/DELETE CRUD works, PMO cannot delete (403), viewer cannot create (403). Dashboard heatmap: GET /api/dashboard/heatmap-risks returns flat list of risks with project_name/program_name enrichment (frontend aggregates to 5x5). UI: Dashboard heatmap section + filters visible (needs scroll), ProjectDetail 'Registre des décisions' with Nouvelle décision modal (all 8 categories, 6 statuses), Governance global table with 3 filters (statut/catégorie/projet) + Nouvelle décision button, viewer sees no buttons. Test data cleaned up.

test_results.heatmap_risk_fields: PASS - probability, impact, project_name, program_name present
test_results.dashboard_heatmap_ui: PASS - section visible with distribution bars
test_results.governance_global_table: PASS - 33 rows (32+1), 3 filter selects, Nouvelle décision button
test_results.governance_filters: PASS - status filter reduces rows (33→6 for 'prise'), reset works
test_results.viewer_read_only: PASS - no Nouvelle décision button in ProjectDetail or Governance
